desc: This is the STU 1 - Ballot version of the De-identification and Anonymization Profiles Library (DAPL) FHIR IG.
title: De-identified, Anonymized FHIR Profiles Library (DAPL) IG
registry-description: The DAPL Implementation Guide defines a set of profiles that will be enable healthcare organizations to submit deidentified or anonymized information for multiple use cases such as federal agency reporting and research.
introduction: De-identified, Anonymized Profiles Library (DAPL) FHIR IG defines a set of FHIR profiles to represent de-identified and anonymized data.
